title: Staff Software Engineer, AI/ML Focus
description:
Role Overview:

As Cambiar expands its national portfolio of education
innovation initiatives, we are scaling our digital
ecosystem—integrating systems, data, and tools and building
products that power our mission. We are seeking a Staff
Software Engineer, AI/ML Focus to join our Technology team,
reporting to the SVP, Technology. This role is critical in
building the next generation of our products and internal
tools.

You will be a lead software engineer skilled at AI and
product development; passionate about using technology to
drive positive social impact. In this role, you will take
significant ownership of technical projects and building
tools and products directly or guiding the work of product
development contractors/vendors in partnership with various
Cambiar product teams. The ideal candidate brings deep
technical acumen and user-focussed problem solving, combined
with the ability to move fast and lay sound groundwork for
future scale. This role requires balancing operational
excellence with the flexibility and creativity that drive
innovation.

What you’ll do:

This role requires hands-on execution, a builder mindset and
expertise in AI and software development (esp backend and
data systems). You will be building tools and products to
enable both internal efficiencies and external products; in
partnership with product teams and where relevant dev
vendors.

Core Responsibilities:

- AI Product Development: Lead the design, prototyping,
  development, and deployment of new user-facing products
  and internal tooling, with a heavy emphasis on leveraging
  Artificial Intelligence both within the product and in
  product development. Implement AI applications/models and
  tuning/RAG where needed. Build products/features, starting
  with MVPs and iterating based on user feedback, while
  establishing reusable patterns for future development.
- System Architecture, Health & Sustainability: As part of
  broader product development, build and ensure systems are
  reliable, secure, performant, and aligned with business
  objectives leveraging both existing or (where needed)
  helping build new organizational infrastructure and data
  systems. Support the health and sustainability of the
  codebase—notice and advocate for patterns that allow code
  to be flexible, scalable, and approachable to other
  engineers.
- Communication, Collaboration & Iteration: While leading and
  owning AI product development and related aspects,
  communicate and collaborate closely across multiple
  roles/stakeholders eg. with Product Management to scope
  and execute product features per prioritization and
  roadmap or with Software Development Vendors to
  design/build/maintain parts of the product. Lean into our
  value of rapid learning cycles—gathering and improving
  product per constant feedback.
- Security & Compliance Champion: Champion security and
  privacy, including looking for ways to make it easier to
  safeguard FERPA/COPPA compliance for sensitive data and
  incorporate security best practices. Implement data
  privacy and security best practices within products and AI
  applications.

This Role Is for You If…

- You bring 5+ years of software engineering experience with
  2+ years of hands-on AI/ML product development ; including
  developing new web/mobile and AI applications from scratch
  with rapid iterations. We value proven ability to ship AI
  features over years of general experience; including
  leveraging AI for automations and product experience with
  LLM tools eg. LangChain.
- You possess backend expertise and proficiency in building
  scalable, robust APIs and systems; including microservices
  architecture and agile development methodologies.
- You thrive in dynamic, entrepreneurial settings, balancing
  structure with adaptability and creative problem-solving.
  You possess a comfort with a startup mindset, taking
  initiative, and dealing with ambiguity.
- You can collaborate effectively with cross-functional
  partners in product, data, policy, and more.
- You are an excellent communicator who can translate and
  motivate complex technical topics into accessible,
  actionable insights for diverse audiences.
- You have some core tech/AI skills:  Python, experience with
  LLM applications (LangChain/similar), and modern web
  frameworks (AWS/GCP). Nice to have: Experience with our
  specific stack (Rails, React, PostgreSQL)
- Experience in education, nonprofit, or social impact
  organizations (EdTech) is a plus.

What you’ll get:

- Salary range of $140,000-$170,000 per year depending on
  experience, location and aligned title
- Comprehensive medical, dental, vision benefits
- Paid vacation and sick time, plus organizationally-observed
  holidays throughout the year
- Access to optional benefits such as 401(k) Retirement Plan,
  Employee Assistance Program (EAP), HSA/FSA, pet insurance,
  etc.
- Stipends to partially cover phone and internet costs, home
  office set-up, and wellness
- Team retreats and meetings during the year to meet your
  teammates or see our work in-person

Work environment:

Although our team works remotely, you are expected to engage
in overnight travel at least 2x throughout the year to
various US cities to meet up with other team members (in-
person retreats, other program-related meetings and events),
and be ready to play an active role in contributing to our
collaborative, inclusive culture.

We’re looking for applicants who are comfortable working
remotely and who have experience successfully collaborating
with team members across different time zones. Your core
working days and hours will be M-F within 8am-6pm, with the
ability to flex according to workload, scheduled calls and
in-person/virtual meetings.

About our organization:

Founded in 2016 as the first K-12 nonprofit venture studio,
Cambiar Education saw untapped potential in the marketplace
that could change the world of education - an opportunity to
foster and advance radical, innovative ideas that massively
accelerate student success for all. Since then, Cambiar has
propelled over 100 game-changing ventures that operate at
the speed of innovation, cultivated a diverse portfolio of
bold and visionary leaders, and built a connected community
anchored in a commitment to creating and scaling solutions
that center our most vulnerable youth. As a member of the
Cambiar Education team, you will help change the marketplace
for education innovation to prove undeniably that every
student can succeed and thrive.

Our Core Values:

We’re committed to living our organization's core values:

- CREATE 🌎 We create to make a transformative difference in
  the world. We are eternally optimistic and develop game-
  changing solutions.
- LOVE ❤️ We do this work because we believe in the tremendous
  talent and human potential of all; we seek to discover,
  engage, and celebrate everyone's unique "superpowers." We
  seek out and lean into diverse ideas, joyful debates, and
  direct feedback.
- GROW 🌱 We have a crazy curiosity, love big challenges, and
  aren't afraid to fail. We accelerate growth and impact so
  change agents and change efforts reach their fullest
  potential.
- LAUGH 😄 We laugh often and out loud; creativity is best
  fostered when we are having fun! We defer judgment so we
  can all laugh, dance, sing, and express "like no one is
  watching."
- DARE 🚀 We dare to dream big, take bold action, and challenge
  the impossible. We embrace risk, push boundaries, and step
  into the unknown with strength and courage, knowing that
  growth lies beyond comfort.

Our Equal Opportunity Employer Intentions:

At Cambiar Education, we believe everyone can make a
positive impact. To support that view, we aim to cultivate
an inclusive workplace that champions educational success
for all and advances the communities we serve. We believe
that a variety of perspectives and experiences strengthens
our community and enhances our impact. Our commitment to
provide an environment free from discrimination and
harassment, where every individual feels respected and
valued, underscores our mission of creating life changing
impact for one million youth.

Cambiar Education is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We are
committed to providing equal employment opportunities to all
employees and applicants without regard to race (including
traits historically associated with race, such as hair
texture and protective hairstyles, including braids, locks,
and twists), ethnicity, religion, religious creed (including
religious dress and grooming practices), color, sex
(including childbirth, breast feeding, and related medical
conditions), gender, gender identity or expression, sexual
orientation, national origin, ancestry, citizenship status,
uniform service member and veteran status, marital status,
pregnancy, age (40 and over), protected medical condition
(including cancer and genetic conditions), genetic
information, disability (mental and physical), reproductive
health decision-making, medical leave or other types of
protected leave (requesting or approved for leave under the
Family and Medical Leave Act or the California Family Rights
Act), domestic violence victim status, political
affiliation, use of cannabis off the job and away from the
workplace, or any other protected status in accordance with
all applicable federal, state, and local laws. This policy
extends to all aspects of our employment practices
including, but not limited to, recruiting, hiring,
promotions, transfers, compensation, benefits, training,
leaves of absence, and other terms and conditions of
employment.

Together, we can create a welcoming environment that
empowers every member of our community.

Implement AI applications and models including tuning and RAG where needed
Build and ensure systems are reliable, secure, performant, and aligned with business objectives

use_cases: AI-powered user-facing products for education innovation
Internal tools and automation leveraging AI for operational efficiencies
LLM-based applications using frameworks like LangChain for product experience
RAG implementations for enhanced AI capabilities
Education technology solutions driving positive social impact and student success
ai_classification_reasoning:
The role requires hands-on implementation of AI applications
and models, specifically mentioning tuning/RAG, developing
new AI applications with LLM tools like LangChain, and
shipping AI features. This is direct work ON AI systems
rather than supporting infrastructure.
